questionHtml: Outline the changes of distribution of the grey squirrel from 1945 to 2010.
markschemeHtml:
a. overall the grey squirrel distribution has increased «and the red squirrel decreased» ✔

b. in 2010 the grey squirrel was found in areas where it was previously not found ✔

c. grey squirrel has dominated/red squirrel virtually eliminated ✔

OWTTE

meta.title: Outline the changes of distribution of the grey squirrel from 1945 to 2010.
breadcrumbLabels: Option C: Ecology and conservation (Core topics)
